headline: Shahed drones, the symbol of Russia-Iran cooperation
description: Exported from Iran to Russia and then locally produced under license, the suicide drone has been enhanced with Russian navigation and jamming technologies, similar to some missiles used by Iran in the war launched by the US and Israel.

headline: 'For sale, 5-year-old child, docile and calm': Yazidi genocide trial dives into horrors of IS
description: The Paris criminal court heard the harrowing reality of the enslavement of a people in the name of religion. Rarely has a terrorism trial gone so far in exposing the atrocities perpetrated by jihadists.

headline: Paris mayoral election: Three candidates head to second round following Knafo's withdrawal
description: Socialist Emmanuel Grégoire has refused any alliance with radical-left candidate Sophia Chikirou, as conservative candidate Rachida Dati looks to benefit from the withdrawal of two candidates.

headline: Rosalía launches her world tour in Lyon
description: The Spanish pop star kicked off her Lux World Tour on Monday at the LDLC Arena, on the outskirts of Lyon, in a whirlwind of style, language and religious imagery.

headline: The EU's politically sensitive debate over eurobonds
description: While the issue of the European Union's joint borrowing still faces strong opposition from Germany and the most fiscally orthodox European countries, it has become relatively uncontroversial among central bankers, economists and financial players.

description: The 2026 municipal elections have already concluded in the vast majority of French towns, with a mayor being directly elected in the first round. In larger cities, however, the right and the Socialists are in the lead for the second round.

headline: French municipal elections: See the first-round results on our map
description: Follow the 2026 municipal elections' first-round results in real time with our interactive map, and see which lists are in the lead and which mayors have been directly elected.

headline: Michelin Guide 2026: Michaël Arnoult, the only new three-star chef
description: The chef at Les Morainières earned a coveted third star in the latest edition of the Michelin Guide, which was unveiled in Monaco on Monday. It was a triumph for the reserved master chef.
